scoring_factors.rationale: AIX 7.2 (proprietary Unix, legacy) and COBOL-2014 (legacy language with shrinking developer pool) represent very high modernization complexity.
All assessed components (OS, language, database) are OUTDATED, with Oracle 19c in Extended Support only.
High business criticality (Finance ERP, 350 users, confidential data) increases risk and complexity of any modernization effort.
Oracle 19c with 1TB storage and license dependency adds migration complexity and cost.
1-Tier monolithic architecture with no CI/CD pipeline increases deployment risk and migration effort.
5 external interfaces require careful integration testing and potential adapter refactoring during modernization.
2 server instances (sv01, sv02) represent a moderate infrastructure footprint.
Planned decommission in 2027 creates timeline pressure for any modernization initiative.
